---
title: "Kolekti" 
description: | 
  This oral presentation was part of the Innovation challenge "For more data on labor informality" hackathon. With this presentation our team was the winner of this hackathon.
date: "2021-03-03"
image: Challenge_labor_informality.jpg
categories:
- 👨‍🏫Oral presentation
- 🏘️Social sciences
- 🌐Web development
---
[{{< fa calendar-check >}} Event]{.btn target=_blank} 
[{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill>}} Slides (Spanish)][slides]{.btn target=_blank}

You can find more details about this project [here][kolekti]. 

[kolekti]: ../../projects/Kolekti/
[event]: https://www.undp.org/es/ecuador/blog/sin-miedo-intentar-algo-nuevo-reto-de-innovacion-por-mas-datos-de-informalidad
[slides]: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7536703
